description: Per-Company cache of Sage's tax catalogue. Populated by the Sage Tax pull. Used by the push paths to resolve the correct sage_idx and rate per Company.

fields.label: Company
fields.description: Which ERPNext Company (= Sage tenant) this tax record was pulled from.

fields.label: Sage Tax ID
fields.description: Sage's internal tax record ID. Sent as taxTypeId on every transaction line pushed to this Sage tenant.

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Sage's own description of the tax record (e.g. 'VAT @ 0.15%'). Stored verbatim.

fields.label: Rate
fields.description: Decimal fraction as Sage returns it. 0.15 represents 15% VAT. Used directly as the tax fraction in price-inclusive math (incl = excl * (1 + rate)) and as taxPercentage on Sage push payloads.

fields.label: Sage Template Label
fields.description: The Sage 'Sales Taxes and Charges Template' name this record belongs to (e.g. 'Standard Rate (Capital Goods)'). Display-only, no logic depends on it.

fields.label: Disabled
fields.description: Set to 1 automatically when the most recent Sage pull no longer returned this record. Existing Item Tax Template mappings pointing here still resolve, but the resolver logs a warning so the misalignment is visible.

fields.label: Last Seen At
fields.description: Timestamp of the most recent Sage pull that returned this record. Cleared if the record stops being returned.

name: Sage Tax
